productName: Green Revolution Shot Sour Watermelon MAX Fly (100mg THC;5mg CBG)
description: A boutique infused beverage with sweet, refreshing watermelon notes, a refreshing finish, and the kind of flavor that makes it feel like a treat before the effects even arrive. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBG to support daytime focus and clarity. For an uplifting, energetic experience.
